# Repository Instructions for AI Coding Agents

This repository is a knowledge and work-management repository for TI AM64x Embedded Linux BSP and Board Bring-up study.

When working in this repository:

- Treat `PROJECT_BRIEF.md` as the current project source of truth.
- Read `AI_AGENT_GUIDE.md` before making or suggesting changes.
- Keep board-specific notes under `docs/boards/<board-name>/`.
- Keep common AM64x knowledge under `docs/common/`.
- Record accepted decisions in `docs/decisions/DECISION_LOG.md`.
- Record reusable research notes in `docs/research/RESEARCH_NOTES.md`.
- Do not present guesses as facts. Mark uncertain items as "확인 필요".
- Prefer practical bring-up structure: 확인할 것, 수정할 파일, 빌드/플래시 절차, 로그에서 볼 포인트, 실패 시 의심 지점.
- If a change affects task status, update `docs/tasks/TASK_BOARD.md`.
